text:
The next one  (fmake again):

"Makefile", line 218: Malformed conditional (${SSL_DEFAULT} != base)

make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue
[00:04:54] ====>> Error: Error getting PKGNAME for net-mgmt/net-snmp
